title: 10 best herbal essential oils for cough
description: Valerian essential oils helps with cough because of its natural anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. When inhaled, valerian oil reduces inflammation in the airways, providing instant relief from congestion and discomfort. Its calming effects also help to relax the throat muscles, reducing spasms that cause persistent coughing. Additionally, valerian's antimicrobial properties help combat infection-causing bacteria and viruses, further alleviating symptoms of respiratory illnesses...
